subcodes.first_line: O Rahim! Depart thou from that land ere the Youth goeth forth from your midst. Thus do We bid thee [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ان یا رحیم فاخرج عن تلک الارض من قبل ان یخرج الغلام عن بینکم و کذلک نامرک ان
subcodes.subjects: @fellowship with the wayward and ungodly, @priestcraft, @personal instructions, @knowledge; recognition of God, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @love of God
